title: Roasted Pork with Golden Gravy
description: A delicious roasted pork dish with a rich golden gravy, perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Season the pork shoulder with salt, pepper, and rosemary.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the pork shoulder until browned on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the pork to a plate and set aside.
Add the sliced onion to the pot and cook until caramelized, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the red wine and beef broth, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pot.
Return the pork shoulder to the pot and transfer to the preheated oven.
Roast the pork for 2-3 hours, or until tender and falling apart.
While the pork is cooking, prepare the golden gravy.
Melt the golden mustard in a small saucepan over low heat.
Whisk in the flour to make a slurry, and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Gradually add the beef broth, whisking constantly, until the gravy thickens.
Serve the roasted pork with the golden gravy spooned over the top.
